title: Automation to fill out connected columns in different boards
excerpt:

posts.author: sandy.nowak (Sandy Nowak)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,
We have a matrix in a main board about our employees. This matrix contains all data relating to the respective employee. This includes personnel data, knowledge and an overview of all training courses. All these INinformation have been divided into 3 smaller boards and are mirrored to the main board. An item is created for each new employee. Accordingly, each time we need to manually create a new connection between the smaller boards and the main board to mirror the employee’s data. Is there an automation or another solution?

Thank you.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sandy.nowak - depending on the timing of when things should be created there are a number of automations you could use. Within the Automations center, just type in “connect” and it will show you many options.

image1263×667 58.1 KB

image1259×609 57.9 KB

Hopefully these help.
Mark
